recentActivities.subject: Windermere homeowner interest check
recentActivities.description: Ashley Walker mentioned at neighborhood gathering that several Windermere homeowners are interested in group maintenance. Suggested organizing an info session at the clubhouse.

recentActivities.subject: Plumbing contractor for Sharon Springs water heaters
recentActivities.description: Spoke with Carlos Ramirez about potential water heater replacement project for Sharon Springs. He quoted $1,203 per unit for groups of 10+. Available starting Q3 2026.

recentActivities.subject: Bridgetown proposal follow-up
recentActivities.description: Called David Mitchell to follow up on the HVAC proposal. Board is reviewing and will vote at their April 10 meeting. He is personally supportive and optimistic about approval.

recentActivities.subject: Lanier Springs welcome packet
recentActivities.description: Sent welcome packet to Kenji Tanaka and other Lanier Springs homeowners introducing HomeSync services. Included maintenance timeline showing their homes will need water heaters in 2-3 years.

recentActivities.subject: Castleberry HVAC sign-ups at 12
recentActivities.description: Updated project status: 12 homes signed up for Castleberry HVAC replacement. 13 more eligible. Push for additional sign-ups before April 15 deadline.

recentActivities.subject: Sharon Springs HVAC planning meeting
recentActivities.description: Met with Maria Garcia to discuss HVAC replacement as next project after successful pressure washing. She will survey homeowners about interest level at next monthly meeting.

recentActivities.subject: Painting contractor quote for Bridgetown
recentActivities.description: Called Fernando Torres at Precision Paint Georgia to discuss potential exterior painting group project for Bridgetown. Got preliminary quote of $3,150 per home for groups of 10+.

recentActivities.subject: Contractor site visit - Castleberry
recentActivities.description: Accompanied Billy Harper on site visits to 3 Castleberry homes for pre-installation assessments. All standard installations, no complications expected.

recentActivities.subject: Bridgetown HVAC proposal document
recentActivities.description: Sent formal proposal to David Mitchell for Bridgetown HVAC group replacement program. Includes contractor qualifications, timeline, pricing, and homeowner agreement template.

recentActivities.subject: Lanier Springs HOA approval meeting
recentActivities.description: Met with Wei Chen and Lanier Springs board. They approved HomeSync as preferred group maintenance coordinator. Younger neighborhood but proactive approach appreciated.
